header.title: Overview
header.description: View your profile status and the recommended next steps.

profileStatusCard.title: Profile status
profileStatusCard.description: Track the progress of your professional profile and quickly access key actions.

progressCard.title: Progress by section
progressCard.description: Identify which parts of your profile need attention to get published.

nextStepsCard.title: Next steps
nextStepsCard.description: These tasks will help you complete the information needed to publish your profile.
nextStepsCard.empty: Great! You have no pending tasks. We'll keep adding recommendations as we roll out new features.

quickActionsCard.title: Quick shortcuts
quickActionsCard.description: Go straight to the sections you'll use most often.

multimedia.title: Manage media
multimedia.description: Photos, videos and updates to boost your profile.

subscription.title: Subscription status
subscription.description: Review your current plan and upcoming charges.

personalData.title: Personal data
personalData.description: Basic information, contact and full bio.

footballData.title: Football data
footballData.description: Career history, current club and positions.

multimedia.title: Media
multimedia.description: Photos and stories that enrich your public profile.

draft.label: Draft
draft.message: Your profile is under construction. Complete the pending steps to submit it for review.

pendingReview.label: Under review
pendingReview.message: Our team is validating the submitted information. You'll receive a notification with the result.

approved.label: Published
approved.message: Your profile is approved and ready to share with clubs and recruiters.

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.message: We need some changes to your application. Review the comments and submit it again.

missing.label: No profile
missing.message: Create your application to generate the professional profile and unlock the editing sections.

pending.label: Under review
pending.message: We've received your application and we're reviewing it. In the meantime, you can keep checking the status from here.

approved.label: Approved
approved.message: The application was approved. You can now complete and publish your professional profile.

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.message: Your application was rejected. You can make the necessary changes and resubmit it whenever you're ready.

applicationStatus.unknownMessage: Contact support for more information about the status of your application.

settings.nativeDescription: The language you write your profile in. Pick the one you're most comfortable with.
settings.nativeHint: Your public profile always keeps a Spanish version (it's the main URL). The assistant can translate from your language into the others.
settings.subscriptionDescription: Manage your plan, downloads, payment methods and cancellations.
settings.alreadySubscribed: You already have an active {plan} plan. If you want to change it, you can manage it here or cancel the current one first.
settings.canceledNotice: Done, your subscription has been marked for cancellation. You keep access until the end of the current period.
settings.currentStatusDescription: Information about the plan currently active.
settings.refundWindow: You have until {date} to cancel within the {days}-day guarantee period. If you cancel within the window, we refund the initial charge.
settings.compAccountDescription: Your Pro access was activated by the BallersHub team — there are no charges associated.
settings.compAccountBody: This subscription is managed directly by the BallersHub team. If you have questions about your expiration or want to extend it, write to us at <link>billing@ballershub.app</link>.
settings.subActionsStripeDescription: Stripe manages the billing portal: update your card, download invoices or cancel from a single place.
settings.subActionsMpDescription: Mercado Pago does not offer a self-service portal. From here you cancel directly — access closes instantly.
settings.proAgencyFeature3: Agency branding on every published portfolio
settings.proAgencyFeature4: Priority support for campaigns and outreach
settings.noPlanCta: You don't have an active plan yet. Try Pro free for {days} days.
settings.billingSupportDescription: A problem with a charge or invoice?
settings.billingSupportBody: Write to us at <link>billing@ballershub.app</link> and we'll reply the same business day.
settings.accountDescription: Manage your credentials, security and general dashboard preferences.
settings.securityDescription: Plans to authenticate securely and monitor access.
settings.twoFactorDescription: You'll be able to enable temporary codes or authenticator apps to strengthen security.
settings.federatedLoginDescription: Set up sign-in with Google, Apple or other providers.
settings.notificationsDescription: Define how you want to receive alerts about your profile, requests and subscription.
settings.notifProfileDescription: Alerts when a staff member updates my information
settings.notifApplicationsDescription: Notifications about account reviews or new requirements
settings.notifBillingDescription: Notices of upcoming renewals or charge issues
settings.notificationsFootnote: You'll be able to select channels (email, WhatsApp, app) and custom frequency in future versions.
settings.activeSessionsDescription: View devices with access to manage remote sign-outs.
settings.sessionsIntegrationNote: The device details and the option to close sessions will be integrated with Supabase Auth Management.
settings.suspiciousActivity: If you detect suspicious activity, contact us at <link>soporte@ballershub.com</link>.

editProfile.personalDataNoProfileDescription: Create your profile to enable editing your personal data.
editProfile.personalDataDescription: Manage your basic and contact information. This data will be used for your public profile and communications.
editProfile.avatarIdentityDescription: Update your photo and main details to keep your professional profile consistent.
editProfile.avatarHelpText: Use a high-resolution image in square format. Images will be used in your automated CV and public profile.
editProfile.footballDataNoProfileDescription: Create your profile to manage your career history, stats and sporting links.
editProfile.footballDataDescription: Organize all your sporting information to build a complete and up-to-date profile.
editProfile.careerHistoryDescription: Manage your sporting history and submit changes to the BallersHub team for validation.
editProfile.seasonStatsDescription: Aggregated tracking of your official numbers to share with clubs and agents.
editProfile.referencesLinksDescription: Connect your profile with external platforms to validate your experience.
editProfile.honoursDescriptionPro: Document titles, individual awards and standout stats.
editProfile.honoursDescriptionFree: Add titles and awards. You need Pro to save them to your profile.
editProfile.multimediaNoProfileDescription: Create your profile to manage galleries, videos and press notes.
editProfile.multimediaDescription: Centralize images, videos and featured articles to boost your digital presence.
